title: relay ws: GROUP_ADD does not verify member pub_id exists in users table
description: relay/src/ws.rs GROUP_ADD validates member_pub_id format (64 hex chars) but does not check it references a real enrolled user (store.users table). Without PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON + FK constraint, any 64-char hex string is accepted and added to group_members. Downstream: GROUP_SEND enqueues messages for non-existent users (they expire without being read). Fix: query store to check pub_id exists in users, return invalidRequest if not, before calling add_group_member().
